sleep.rationale: Recent nights matter most — sleep quality is highly responsive to acute changes

hrv_recovery.rationale: Moderate recency bias — autonomic recovery reflects 3-7 day patterns

training.rationale: Adaptations take weeks — training stimulus needs longer averaging

nutrition_body_comp.rationale: Changes are gradual — weight and body composition shift over weeks

mood_mental.rationale: High day-to-day variability — recent state matters most
